summary: Plan-only remediation assessment for five open PRs. No GitHub mutations are planned because the job blocks comments, labels, closes, force-pushes, and bypassing checks. No PR has complete merge preflight proof with Codex /review, resolved bot-review findings, and known mergeability, so no merge_candidate is emitted.

actions.reason: Useful narrow contributor PR, but merge preflight is incomplete and one check is failing.
The PR has useful contributor intent but is superseded by #93938 and needs either author repair or replacement through the stronger candidate path; close is blocked by job frontmatter.
Canonical Telegram repair candidate, but it still needs mergeability resolution and Codex /review before merge can be recommended.
Broad feature/config delta with missing intent and failed proof requires maintainer judgment under the job's require_human_for broad_code_delta gate.
Narrow likely-valid docs PR, but merge preflight is incomplete; repair should verify anchors on current main and obtain review/preflight rather than closing as low-signal.

needs_human: #93940 requires maintainer judgment because the Feishu PR is a broad feature/refactor delta with failed proof and an unfilled template body.

repair_candidate.summary: Repair the viable contributor PRs rather than replacing them: #93933 for Slack identity edits, #93938 as the Telegram canonical over #93927, and #93941 for docs anchors. Do not create an executable fix PR for broad Feishu PR #93940 without maintainer scoping. No merge is recommended until each candidate has known mergeability, passing required checks, resolved review/bot comments, and a clean Codex /review.
repair_candidate.pr_title: chore: finalize narrow Slack, Telegram, and docs remediation PRs
repair_candidate.pr_body:
Plan-only Clownfish artifact for live-pr-inventory-20260617T081753-007.

Scope:
- Repair/validate #93933 for Slack edited-message identity forwarding for #58737.
- Treat #93938 as the canonical Telegram surrogate-pair chunker fix for #93921; #93927 is superseded but contributor credit should be preserved.
- Repair/validate #93941 for two docs anchor corrections.

Do not include #93940 without maintainer scoping because it is a broad Feishu feature/refactor PR with failed proof and an unfilled template body.

Required before merge:
- Known mergeability against current main.
- Required checks passing or explicitly accepted by maintainers.
- Review and bot-review comments resolved.
- Codex /review run cleanly with findings addressed.
- Targeted tests and pnpm check:changed recorded.
credit_notes: Preserve credit for liuhao1024 on source PR #93933 if repairing or replacing the Slack fix.

Preserve credit for Nas01010101 on source PR #93938 as the canonical Telegram fix and for lsr911 on source PR #93927 as the earlier overlapping contributor attempt if replacement text mentions supersession.
Preserve credit for Alix-007 on source PR #93941 if repairing or replacing the docs anchor fix.
